codes.W_GDP_X: GDP weights at actual exchange rates
codes.W_VA: Value added weights in industry excluding construction at factor costs 2010 converted by exchange rate
codes.SVLOAHH: Share of loans with fixation period or residual maturity or next interest rate reset in the next one year in total loans to households
codes.SVLOANFC: Share of loans with fixation period or residual maturity or next interest rate reset in the next one year in total loans to non-financial corporations

codes.AWU2M3: Average weighted by monetary contributions M3 over the euro area (moving composition)
codes.D80W: Euro area 12 (fixed composition) and new EU Member States 2004 (CY,CZ,EE,HU,LV,LT,MT,PL,SK,SI) country weights
codes.I2WM3: Weight within the euro area 12 (fixed composition) by monetary contributions M3
codes.MAVC3M: Centered moving average over the last 3 months
codes.PGDPMA3Y: Moving average over the last 3 years, percentage of gdp
codes.V1W: EU 27 (fixed composition as of 1 January 2007) country weights
codes.V3W: EU 28 (fixed composition as of 1 July 2013) country weights
codes.V5W: EU 27 (fixed composition as of 31 January 2020, brexit) country weights

codes.4D_N: European Commission - Eurostat, Neither seasonally or working day adjusted
codes.4F_N: ECB, Neither seasonally or working day adjusted
codes.4F_N_E: ECB, Neither seasonally or working day adjusted, Euro
codes.4F_Y: ECB, Working day and seasonally adjusted
codes.4F5B: BIS series used in ECB function
codes.4F5B_N: BIS series used in ECB function, Neither seasonally or working day adjusted
codes.4F5B_Y: BIS series used in ECB function, Working day and seasonally adjusted
codes.4FRT: REUTERS series used in ECB function
codes.5A_S: OECD, Seasonally adjusted, not working day adjusted
codes.5B_N: BIS, Neither seasonally or working day adjusted
codes.5B_S: BIS, Seasonally adjusted, not working day adjusted
codes.5B_Y: BIS, Working day and seasonally adjusted
